title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Straw Hat Pirates, Black Maria, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is he aware that the whole island is receiving this Trans- mission?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nico Robin has information the whole world wants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What kind of man does this?! Gahahaha!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seriously? He must be up against a woman...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, Nami! Sanji's voice is coming out of that thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw it earlier too! What is that eye?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff... huff... hurry up and get me out of these webs!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, I wasn't really going to let you leave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Weren't you just talking about how much you adored me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This isn't business anymore, it's personal:-)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I want you to be my pet..

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: All the ladies of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Cheating isn't something I can just forgive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait! My argument Haki won't work...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If there's a chance I could hurt you!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 44 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
